overall.description: Game engine footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing exploration of the Astronomy Tower. The player character moves through Gothic stone corridors, ascends a grand spiral staircase with stained glass windows, enters a circular observatory with blue walls and a mechanical orrery, and exits up a narrow wooden stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic castle corridor with tapestries and sculptures

events.description: camera pans left from tapestry to reveal the stone corridor
begins walking forward through the corridor toward the archway

agents.ego_description: standing before a tapestry depicting trolls in tutus, then panning left to explore the corridor and approach the staircase

entered.detail: large wall tapestry depicting green trolls wearing pink tutus against a dark forest background
Gothic pointed stone archway leading to the staircase
white marble bust of a figure on a pedestal set into a wall niche
wooden bench with green upholstered cushion
several framed landscape paintings hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens focused on a whimsical tapestry of trolls in tutus. The camera pans left to reveal a Gothic stone corridor with a marble bust, wooden bench, and framed paintings. The player then begins walking forward toward a stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: Grand stone spiral staircase with stained glass windows

events.description: text 'Astronomy Tower' appears at bottom of screen
passing a robed NPC descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone spiral staircase, passing tall stained glass windows

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs in dark wizard robes, moving opposite to the camera

entered.detail: wide curving stone staircase with worn wooden steps and stone balustrades
tall arched stained glass windows with circular designs allowing diffused light
ornate hanging chandelier with multiple candle-style lights suspended from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the grand stone staircase of the Astronomy Tower, passing tall stained glass windows that cast colored light. At 11 seconds, the location text appears. The player passes an NPC in dark robes descending the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: Upper staircase landing with astronomical tapestries

events.description: approaching and passing through wooden doors into the astronomy tower room

agents.ego_description: continuing up the stairs past suits of armor and blue astronomical tapestries toward the tower entrance

entered.detail: full suit of medieval plate armor standing in a corner niche
blue tapestries depicting astronomers with telescopes and celestial charts
large dark wooden double doors with iron hinges leading into the tower room

segments.scene_description: Continuing the ascent, the camera passes a suit of armor and blue tapestries depicting astronomical scenes. The staircase becomes narrower as it approaches the wooden double doors marking the entrance to the Astronomy Tower proper.

scene_state.functional_zone: Circular astronomy observatory with orrery chandelier and star ceiling

events.description: camera tilts up to reveal the domed ceiling painted with stars and the mechanical orrery
panning right to show the curved desks, bookshelves, and other NPCs in the room

agents.ego_description: entering the circular tower room, looking up at the orrery and star ceiling, then panning around to observe the observatory equipment

notable_agents.action: standing near a large wooden bookshelf examining astronomical instruments

entered.detail: large mechanical orrery with rotating brass rings and glowing lights suspended from the ceiling
domed ceiling painted deep blue with stars, visible through the orrery structure
multiple brass telescopes positioned by the tall arched windows
semicircular wooden desks with astronomical charts arranged around the room perimeter
deep blue tapestries with gold star patterns covering the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the magnificent circular observatory with deep blue walls and gold accents. Looking up reveals a stunning mechanical orrery suspended beneath a painted starry ceiling. The room contains curved desks, telescopes by the windows, and other students examining equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: Narrow wooden service staircase to upper level

events.description: exiting the astronomy tower room into a narrow wooden stairwell
reaching the top landing with a closed wooden door

agents.ego_description: exiting the astronomy tower and climbing a steep narrow wooden staircase to a dead end door

entered.detail: steep narrow staircase with wooden steps, beams, and railings
furniture covered with white dust sheets stacked against the wall
closed wooden door at the top of the stairs with metal handle

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the grand observatory into a narrow, dimly lit wooden staircase. Passing covered furniture, the camera ascends the steep steps to reach a closed wooden door at the top, marking the end of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a whimsical Gothic corridor through a grand ascent and into a celestial observatory. It begins with a close-up of a tapestry of trolls in tutus before panning left to reveal a stone hallway adorned with a marble bust and framed paintings. As the camera moves forward through a stone archway, it ascends a grand staircase where tall stained glass windows cast colored light and a robed figure descends. The path continues past suits of armor and astronomical tapestries, narrowing as it passes through double doors to enter a magnificent circular observatory featuring deep blue walls and a massive mechanical orrery suspended beneath a starry ceiling. Finally, the camera exits the gold-accented room and climbs a narrow, dimly lit wooden staircase past covered furniture toward a closed door at the summit.
